Found 1 error in src/gateway/server-v2.ts:6577

Yep — I can fix it, but your current workspace only has `index.ts`, `scheduler.ts`, and `types.ts`, so I can’t edit `src/gateway/server-v2.ts` from here.  
Please share `types.ts` (where `TaskControlResponse` is defined) and the return block around `server-v2.ts:6577`, and I’ll give you the exact patch (likely adding `scheduled_jobs` to `TaskControlResponse` or renaming that field to match the existing type).
